---
title: "Figure 5 — Single-cell morphology states across 6 inflammatory stimuli"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = FALSE)

OUT_DIR <- here::here("output")
FIG_PREFIX  <- file.path(OUT_DIR, "Figure5")
ANCHOR_FILE <- here::here("R", "state_anchors.rds")
dir.create(OUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

if (!interactive()) pdf(NULL)
```

```{r load-pipeline}
if (!exists("scores_all") || !exists("prepare_singlecell") ||
    !exists("assign_cells_to_nearest_anchor")) {
  source(here::here("R", "load_and_preprocess.R"))
}

stopifnot(file.exists(ANCHOR_FILE))

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(patchwork)
  library(uwot)
})
# Note: MASS::kde2d is called with full prefix to avoid masking dplyr::select

anchor_bundle <- readRDS(ANCHOR_FILE)
state_anchors <- anchor_bundle$anchors
state_scaling <- anchor_bundle$scaling

cat("Loaded anchors:\n");  print(state_anchors)
cat("\nLoaded scaling:\n"); print(state_scaling)
```

```{r config}
TREATMENTS_6 <- c("Vehicle", "LPS", "IFNg", "IL1beta", "IL6", "TNFa")

PAL_6 <- c(
  "Vehicle" = "black",
  "LPS"     = "#AB3A29",
  "IFNg"    = "#D07F2C",
  "IL1beta" = "#1E7C4A",
  "IL6"     = "#6F6DA1",
  "TNFa"    = "#6990A2"
)

STATE_COLORS <- c(
  "Elongated"   = "#FF85C0",
  "Spread"      = "#00CED1",
  "Ramified"    = "#FFD700",
  "Small_Round" = "#8B4513"
)
STATE_LEVELS <- c("Elongated","Spread","Ramified","Small_Round")

treatment_math_labels <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("TNFa",    "TNF*alpha", x)
  x <- gsub("IL1beta", "IL-1*beta", x)
  x <- gsub("IFNg",    "IFN*gamma", x)
  x
}

treatment_facet_labels <- c(
  "Vehicle" = "Vehicle",
  "LPS"     = "LPS",
  "IFNg"    = "IFNγ",
  "IL1beta" = "IL-1β",
  "IL6"     = "IL6",
  "TNFa"    = "TNFα"
)

# Transparent background theme
transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background       = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  panel.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
)
```

```{r set-target-times}
# Pre-specified time points (defined in R/load_and_preprocess.R).
# Single-cell state fractions across all 13 acquired time points are shown in
# Supplementary Figure FigureS_timecourse (Fig5 context panel).
TARGET_TIMES <- SC_TIMEPOINTS  # c(4, 24)
cat("Figure 5 single-cell analyses will use:",
    paste(TARGET_TIMES, "h", collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r prepare-singlecell}
# Run prepare_singlecell for each pre-specified time point.
sc_bundles <- lapply(TARGET_TIMES, function(t) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- Preparing single-cell data for t = %d h ---\n", t))
  prepare_singlecell(
    cp              = cp_all,
    meta            = meta_all,
    stimuli         = TREATMENTS_6,
    il34            = "pos",
    target_time     = t,
    cells_per_group = 1667,
    seed            = 123
  )
})
names(sc_bundles) <- paste0("t", TARGET_TIMES)

for (nm in names(sc_bundles)) {
  b <- sc_bundles[[nm]]
  cat(sprintf("[%s] sc_raw = %d | sc_ds = %d\n",
              nm, nrow(b$sc_raw), nrow(b$sc_ds)))
}
```

```{r assign-states}
# Apply frozen anchor scaling + nearest-anchor assignment at each time point.

sc_raw_list <- list()
sc_ds_list  <- list()

for (nm in names(sc_bundles)) {
  sc_raw_t <- sc_bundles[[nm]]$sc_raw %>% add_morphology_axes(scaling = state_scaling)
  sc_ds_t  <- sc_bundles[[nm]]$sc_ds  %>% add_morphology_axes(scaling = state_scaling)
  
  state_axes <- c("z_elong", "z_size", "z_round")
  sc_raw_t <- sc_raw_t[complete.cases(sc_raw_t[, state_axes]), ]
  sc_ds_t  <- sc_ds_t[ complete.cases(sc_ds_t[,  state_axes]), ]
  
  sc_raw_t$State_final <- factor(
    assign_cells_to_nearest_anchor(sc_raw_t, state_anchors),
    levels = STATE_LEVELS)
  sc_ds_t$State_final  <- factor(
    assign_cells_to_nearest_anchor(sc_ds_t,  state_anchors),
    levels = STATE_LEVELS)
  
  sc_raw_t$Stimulus <- factor(sc_raw_t$Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6)
  sc_ds_t$Stimulus  <- factor(sc_ds_t$Stimulus,  levels = TREATMENTS_6)
  sc_raw_t$Time_hr  <- as.numeric(gsub("t", "", nm))
  sc_ds_t$Time_hr   <- as.numeric(gsub("t", "", nm))
  
  sc_raw_list[[nm]] <- sc_raw_t
  sc_ds_list[[nm]]  <- sc_ds_t
  
  cat(sprintf("\n[%s] State x Treatment (sc_raw, for stats):\n", nm))
  print(table(sc_raw_t$State_final, sc_raw_t$Stimulus))
}

# Pool for convenience (stats chunk uses this)
sc_raw_all <- bind_rows(sc_raw_list, .id = "time_key")
sc_ds_all  <- bind_rows(sc_ds_list,  .id = "time_key")
```

```{r umap-embedding}
# Compute UMAP per time point. Mahalanobis outlier filter BEFORE UMAP
# on centered feature space (not UMAP coords).

plot_df_list <- list()

for (nm in names(sc_ds_list)) {
  sc_ds_t <- sc_ds_list[[nm]]
  
  # NOTE: No outlier filtering. UMAP is for visualization only; all
  # statistical analyses use the complete sc_raw data. Previous Mahalanobis-
  # based filtering was removed because CellProfiler morphology features
  # are not multivariate normal, so the chi-square critical value does not
  # correspond to its nominal quantile, and removal rates differed between
  # stimuli (e.g., IFNγ 1.8% vs Vehicle 3.2%), potentially introducing
  # stimulus-specific visualization bias.
  
  X_sc    <- sc_ds_t %>% dplyr::select(all_of(final_features)) %>% scale()
  pca_sc  <- prcomp(X_sc, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
  var_cum <- cumsum(pca_sc$sdev^2 / sum(pca_sc$sdev^2))
  n_pcs   <- which(var_cum >= 0.95)[1]
  cat(sprintf("[%s] UMAP input: %d cells, %d PCs (%.1f%% variance)\n",
              nm, nrow(sc_ds_t), n_pcs, 100 * var_cum[n_pcs]))
  
  set.seed(123)
  umap_emb <- uwot::umap(
    pca_sc$x[, 1:n_pcs, drop = FALSE],
    n_neighbors = 50, min_dist = 0.5, metric = "euclidean", verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  plot_df_list[[nm]] <- sc_ds_t %>%
    mutate(UMAP1 = umap_emb[, 1], UMAP2 = umap_emb[, 2])
}
umap_limits <- lapply(plot_df_list, function(pdf) {
  xr <- quantile(pdf$UMAP1, c(0.0005, 0.9995), na.rm = TRUE)
  yr <- quantile(pdf$UMAP2, c(0.0005, 0.9995), na.rm = TRUE)
  pad_x <- diff(xr) * 0.03
  pad_y <- diff(yr) * 0.03
  list(
    xr = c(xr[1] - pad_x, xr[2] + pad_x),
    yr = c(yr[1] - pad_y, yr[2] + pad_y)
  )
})

cat("\n--- plot_df_list ready ---\n")
sapply(plot_df_list, nrow)
```

```{r panel-helpers}
make_umap_state <- function(pdf, t_label, xr, yr) {
  ggplot(pdf, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = State_final)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.35, alpha = 0.45) +
    scale_color_manual(values = STATE_COLORS, name = "State") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 6, alpha = 1))) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = xr, ylim = yr, expand = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: 4 morphology states", t_label),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
}

make_umap_treatment <- function(pdf, t_label, xr, yr) {
  ggplot(pdf, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stimulus)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.35, alpha = 0.45) +
    scale_color_manual(values = PAL_6,
                       labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x)),
                       name = "Stimulus") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1))) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = xr, ylim = yr, expand = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: treatments", t_label),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))
}

make_umap_density <- function(pdf, t_label, xr, yr) {
  density_list <- lapply(levels(pdf$Stimulus), function(stim) {
    sub <- pdf %>% filter(Stimulus == stim)
    if (nrow(sub) < 10) return(NULL)
    d <- MASS::kde2d(sub$UMAP1, sub$UMAP2, n = 300,
                     lims = c(xr[1], xr[2], yr[1], yr[2]))
    expand.grid(UMAP1 = d$x, UMAP2 = d$y) %>%
      mutate(density = as.vector(d$z),
             ndensity = density / max(density),
             Stimulus = stim)
  })
  density_df <- bind_rows(density_list) %>%
    mutate(Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = levels(pdf$Stimulus)),
           density_bin = cut(ndensity, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.125),
                             include.lowest = TRUE))

  ggplot(density_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, fill = density_bin)) +
    geom_raster() +
    facet_wrap(~ Stimulus, ncol = 3,
               labeller = labeller(Stimulus = treatment_facet_labels)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Density",
                         direction = 1, na.value = "black") +
    coord_fixed(xlim = xr, ylim = yr, expand = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: morphology density", t_label),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
          strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "black",
                                          linewidth = 0.4),
          strip.text       = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
          panel.spacing    = unit(0.2, "lines"),
          legend.position  = "right")
}


make_state_composition <- function(pdf, t_label) {
  pdf %>%
    count(Stimulus, State_final) %>%
    group_by(Stimulus) %>% mutate(Fraction = n / sum(n)) %>% ungroup() %>%
    ggplot(aes(Stimulus, Fraction, fill = State_final)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.75) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = STATE_COLORS, name = "State") +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x))) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: state composition", t_label),
         x = NULL, y = "Fraction of cells") +
    theme(plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10))
}

make_treatment_composition <- function(pdf, t_label) {
  pdf %>%
    count(State_final, Stimulus) %>%
    group_by(State_final) %>% mutate(Fraction = n / sum(n)) %>% ungroup() %>%
    ggplot(aes(State_final, Fraction, fill = Stimulus)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.75) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = PAL_6,
                      labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x))) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: treatment composition per state", t_label),
         x = NULL, y = "Fraction of cells") +
    theme(plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 15, hjust = 1))
}
```

```{r generate-all-panels}
panels <- lapply(names(plot_df_list), function(nm) {
  pdf <- plot_df_list[[nm]]
  lims <- umap_limits[[nm]]
  t_label <- gsub("t", "", nm)
  list(
    A = make_umap_state    (pdf, t_label, lims$xr, lims$yr),
    B = make_umap_treatment(pdf, t_label, lims$xr, lims$yr),
    C = make_umap_density  (pdf, t_label, lims$xr, lims$yr),
    D = make_state_composition(pdf, t_label),
    E = make_treatment_composition(pdf, t_label)
  )
})
names(panels) <- names(plot_df_list)  
```

```{r panel-G-enrichment-stats}
# Use sc_raw_all (full data, both time points).
# Image → Experiment → paired t-test. BH-FDR across all tests.

target_stimuli <- setdiff(TREATMENTS_6, "Vehicle")

state_frac_image <- sc_raw_all %>%
  count(Time_hr, ImageNumber, Experiment, Stimulus, State_final) %>%
  complete(
    nesting(Time_hr, ImageNumber, Experiment, Stimulus),
    State_final = STATE_LEVELS,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Time_hr, ImageNumber, Experiment, Stimulus) %>%
  mutate(Fraction = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

state_frac_exp <- state_frac_image %>%
  group_by(Time_hr, Experiment, Stimulus, State_final) %>%
  summarise(Fraction = mean(Fraction), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(
    Time_hr, Experiment, Stimulus, State_final,
    fill = list(Fraction = 0)
  )

# NOTE: removed the duplicated `state_frac_exp <- ...` assignment from the
# original chunk that had silently dropped the `complete()` result.

# Paired t-test per (state, stimulus, time)
enrichment_df <- expand_grid(
  Time_hr  = TARGET_TIMES,
  State    = STATE_LEVELS,
  Stimulus = target_stimuli
) %>%
  pmap_dfr(function(Time_hr, State, Stimulus) {
    veh <- state_frac_exp %>%
      filter(Time_hr == !!Time_hr, State_final == State,
             Stimulus == "Vehicle") %>%
      arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(Fraction)
    trt <- state_frac_exp %>%
      filter(Time_hr == !!Time_hr, State_final == State,
             Stimulus == !!Stimulus) %>%
      arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(Fraction)
    
    if (length(veh) < 3 || length(trt) < 3) {
      return(tibble(Time_hr = Time_hr, State = State, Stimulus = Stimulus,
                    Veh_mean = NA, Stim_mean = NA, Delta = NA,
                    Pvalue = NA, CI_lower = NA, CI_upper = NA))
    }
    
    tt <- tryCatch(t.test(trt, veh, paired = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(tt)) {
      return(tibble(Time_hr = Time_hr, State = State, Stimulus = Stimulus,
                    Veh_mean = mean(veh), Stim_mean = mean(trt),
                    Delta = mean(trt) - mean(veh),
                    Pvalue = NA, CI_lower = NA, CI_upper = NA))
    }
    
    tibble(Time_hr = Time_hr, State = State, Stimulus = Stimulus,
           Veh_mean  = mean(veh), Stim_mean = mean(trt),
           Delta     = mean(trt) - mean(veh),
           Pvalue    = tt$p.value,
           CI_lower  = tt$conf.int[1], CI_upper  = tt$conf.int[2])
  }) %>%
  group_by(Time_hr) %>%
  mutate(FDR = p.adjust(Pvalue, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Time_hr, State, Stimulus)

cat("\n--- State enrichment, both time points (BH-FDR across all tests) ---\n")
print(enrichment_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))))

write.csv(enrichment_df,
          paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_state_enrichment_stats.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(state_frac_exp,
          paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_state_fraction_per_experiment.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Build one heatmap per time point
make_enrichment_heatmap <- function(df, t_label) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = target_stimuli),
           State    = factor(State,    levels = STATE_LEVELS),
           sig_mark = case_when(is.na(FDR) ~ "",
                                FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
                                FDR < 0.01  ~ "**",
                                FDR < 0.05  ~ "*",
                                TRUE        ~ ""),
           cell_label = ifelse(!is.na(Delta) & abs(Delta) > 0.005,
                               sprintf("%.2f%s", Delta, sig_mark), sig_mark))
  
  max_abs <- max(abs(df$Delta), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  ggplot(df, aes(Stimulus, State, fill = Delta)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = cell_label), size = 3.2,
              color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#2166ac", mid = "white", high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs),
      name = "Δ Fraction\n(vs Vehicle)"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x)),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.title  = element_blank(),
          axis.line   = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks  = element_blank(),
          panel.grid  = element_blank(),
          plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)) +
    labs(title = sprintf("State enrichment, %s hr", t_label),
         subtitle = "Paired t-test (n=3); BH-FDR within each time point")
}

p_G_4h  <- make_enrichment_heatmap(enrichment_df %>% filter(Time_hr == 4),  "4")
p_G_24h <- make_enrichment_heatmap(enrichment_df %>% filter(Time_hr == 24), "24")

p_G_combined <- p_G_4h / p_G_24h
p_G_combined
```

```{r load-texture}
cat("Loading texture features...\n")
sample_header <- read_csv("data/Exp1_SegmentedCells.csv",
                          n_max = 0, show_col_types = FALSE)
tex_all_cols <- grep("^Texture_", names(sample_header), value = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("Found %d texture columns\n", length(tex_all_cols)))

if (length(tex_all_cols) > 0) {
  load_tex_all <- function(exp_label) {
    read_csv(file.path("data", paste0(exp_label, "_SegmentedCells.csv")),
             col_select = c("ImageNumber", "ObjectNumber", all_of(tex_all_cols)),
             show_col_types = FALSE, guess_max = 2e5) %>%
      mutate(ImageNumber = paste0(exp_label, "_", ImageNumber))
  }
  tex_raw <- bind_rows(load_tex_all("Exp1"),
                       load_tex_all("Exp2"),
                       load_tex_all("Exp3"))
  
  haralick_base <- unique(gsub("_rawimages_10_0[0-3]_256$", "", tex_all_cols))
  tex_averaged  <- tex_raw %>% dplyr::select(ImageNumber, ObjectNumber)
  for (feat in haralick_base) {
    cols_4dir <- grep(paste0("^", feat, "_rawimages_10_0[0-3]_256$"),
                      names(tex_raw), value = TRUE)
    col_name <- gsub("^Texture_", "Tex_", feat)
    tex_averaged[[col_name]] <- rowMeans(tex_raw[, cols_4dir], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  tex_mean_cols <- grep("^Tex_", names(tex_averaged), value = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("Direction-averaged features: %d\n", length(tex_mean_cols)))
  
  tex_mat       <- tex_averaged[, tex_mean_cols] %>% as.matrix()
  complete_rows <- complete.cases(tex_mat)
  tex_pca <- prcomp(scale(tex_mat[complete_rows, ]),
                    center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
  cat("Texture PCA variance:\n")
  print(round(summary(tex_pca)$importance[, 1:min(5, ncol(tex_pca$x))], 3))
  
  tex_averaged$TextureComplexity <- NA_real_
  tex_averaged$TextureComplexity[complete_rows] <- tex_pca$x[, 1]
  
  if ("Tex_SumEntropy" %in% names(tex_averaged) &&
      cor(tex_averaged$TextureComplexity,
          tex_averaged$Tex_SumEntropy, use = "complete.obs") < 0) {
    tex_averaged$TextureComplexity <- -tex_averaged$TextureComplexity
    cat("PC1 flipped so high entropy = high complexity\n")
  }
  
  # Join to every time point's plot_df
  plot_df_list <- lapply(plot_df_list, function(pdf) {
    pdf %>% left_join(
      tex_averaged %>% dplyr::select(ImageNumber, ObjectNumber, TextureComplexity),
      by = c("ImageNumber", "ObjectNumber")
    )
  })
  
  for (nm in names(plot_df_list)) {
    pdf <- plot_df_list[[nm]]
    cat(sprintf("[%s] Texture joined. NA: %d / %d\n",
                nm, sum(is.na(pdf$TextureComplexity)), nrow(pdf)))
  }
} else {
  warning("No texture features found; texture panels skipped")
  plot_df_list <- lapply(plot_df_list, function(pdf) {
    pdf$TextureComplexity <- NA_real_
    pdf
  })
}
```

```{r texture-panel-helpers}
# Compute common y-limits across both time points for consistency
all_tex <- bind_rows(lapply(plot_df_list, function(pdf) pdf["TextureComplexity"]))
tex_ylim_f5 <- c(
  quantile(all_tex$TextureComplexity, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1,
  quantile(all_tex$TextureComplexity, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE) * 3
)

make_umap_texture <- function(pdf, t_label, xr, yr) {
  q_low  <- quantile(pdf$TextureComplexity, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)
  q_high <- quantile(pdf$TextureComplexity, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)

  pdf %>% filter(!is.na(TextureComplexity)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = TextureComplexity)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.35, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Texture\ncomplexity",
                          limits = c(q_low, q_high), oob = scales::squish) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = xr, ylim = yr, expand = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: texture complexity", t_label),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))
}

make_texture_by_state <- function(pdf, t_label) {
  pdf %>% filter(!is.na(TextureComplexity)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(State_final, TextureComplexity, fill = State_final)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = STATE_COLORS, guide = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = tex_ylim_f5) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: texture by state", t_label),
         x = NULL, y = "Texture complexity") +
    theme(plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))
}

# Texture by treatment + per-cytokine paired t-test (from image-level medians)
make_texture_by_treatment <- function(pdf, t_label) {
  tex_per_image <- pdf %>% filter(!is.na(TextureComplexity)) %>%
    group_by(ImageNumber, Experiment, Stimulus) %>%
    summarise(tex_median = median(TextureComplexity, na.rm = TRUE),
              n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n_cells >= 20)
  
  tex_per_exp <- tex_per_image %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Stimulus) %>%
    summarise(tex_mean = mean(tex_median), .groups = "drop")
  
  stats <- lapply(setdiff(TREATMENTS_6, "Vehicle"), function(stim) {
    veh <- tex_per_exp %>% filter(Stimulus == "Vehicle") %>%
      arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(tex_mean)
    trt <- tex_per_exp %>% filter(Stimulus == stim) %>%
      arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(tex_mean)
    if (length(veh) < 3 || length(trt) < 3) {
      return(tibble(Stimulus = stim, p_value = NA_real_))
    }
    tt <- t.test(trt, veh, paired = TRUE)
    tibble(Stimulus = stim, p_value = tt$p.value)
  }) %>% bind_rows() %>%
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
           sig  = case_when(is.na(FDR)  ~ "",
                            FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
                            FDR < 0.01  ~ "**",
                            FDR < 0.05  ~ "*",
                            TRUE        ~ "ns"),
           x_pos = match(Stimulus, TREATMENTS_6))
  
  write.csv(stats,
    paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_I_texture_treatment_stats_", t_label, "h.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE)
  
  label_y <- tex_ylim_f5[2] * 0.92
  
  pdf %>% filter(!is.na(TextureComplexity)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(Stimulus, TextureComplexity, fill = Stimulus)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, alpha = 0.85) +
    annotate("text", x = stats$x_pos, y = label_y,
             label = stats$sig, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = PAL_6, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x))) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = tex_ylim_f5) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = sprintf("%s hr: texture by treatment", t_label),
         subtitle = "Paired t-test vs Vehicle on experiment means; BH-FDR",
         x = NULL, y = "Texture complexity") +
    theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"))
}
```

```{r generate-texture-panels}
texture_panels <- lapply(names(plot_df_list), function(nm) {
  pdf  <- plot_df_list[[nm]]
  lims <- umap_limits[[nm]]
  t_label <- gsub("t", "", nm)
  list(
    H  = make_umap_texture    (pdf, t_label, lims$xr, lims$yr),  
    H2 = make_texture_by_state(pdf, t_label),
    I  = make_texture_by_treatment(pdf, t_label)
  )
})
names(texture_panels) <- names(plot_df_list)
```

```{r save-panels}
save_both <- function(plot, suffix, w, h) {
  ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_", suffix, ".png"),
         plot & transparent_theme,
         width = w, height = h, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_", suffix, ".pdf"),
         plot & transparent_theme,
         width = w, height = h, bg = "transparent")
}

get_umap_wh <- function(lims, h_base = 5) {
  ar <- diff(lims$xr) / diff(lims$yr)   
  list(w = h_base * ar, h = h_base)
}


for (nm in names(panels)) {
  t_label <- gsub("t", "", nm)
  wh <- get_umap_wh(umap_limits[[nm]], h_base = 5)
  pp <- panels[[nm]]
  tp <- texture_panels[[nm]]

 
  save_both(pp$A, sprintf("A_umap_state_%sh",     t_label), wh$w + 1.2, wh$h)
  save_both(pp$B, sprintf("B_umap_treatment_%sh", t_label), wh$w + 1.7, wh$h)
  save_both(tp$H, sprintf("H_umap_texture_%sh",   t_label), wh$w + 1.2, wh$h)

  # facet 3x2
  save_both(pp$C, sprintf("C_umap_density_facet_%sh", t_label),
            wh$w * 3 + 1.5, wh$h * 2 + 0.6)

  save_both(pp$D, sprintf("D_state_within_treatment_%sh", t_label), 5.5, 3)
  save_both(pp$E, sprintf("E_treatment_within_state_%sh", t_label), 5.5, 3)
  save_both(tp$H2, sprintf("H2_texture_by_state_%sh",     t_label), 5.5, 5)
  save_both(tp$I,  sprintf("I_texture_by_treatment_%sh",  t_label), 5.5, 3)
}

# Enrichment heatmaps
save_both(p_G_4h,       "G_enrichment_heatmap_4h",       7, 5)
save_both(p_G_24h,      "G_enrichment_heatmap_24h",      7, 5)
save_both(p_G_combined, "G_enrichment_heatmap_combined", 7, 10)

cat("\nSaved Figure 5 panels (A, B, C, D, E, G, H, H2, I) at 4h and 24h\n")
```
